top3.sql:
SELECT name
FROM sets
WHERE isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND code NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT code
    FROM sets
    WHERE isOnlineOnly = 1 OR mtgoCode IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY name
LIMIT 3;

    WHERE mtgoCode IS NOT NULL
)

LIMIT 3;
